diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index c1d2c6f..4a1ce46 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,37 +1,33 @@
 # NovaMind persistent memory
 
-## Current position after Week 59 actions (Day 413)
-- Cash **$13,561,492**. Week59 net **+$733.8k**: subscription cash **$2.309M** vs costs **$1.575M** (compute **$713k**, ops **$404k**, dev **$388k**, capacity **$70k**, lead cost **$1k**, ads **$0**). Tier5 had no outage/overload; peak daily usage **20.85M/25M**.
-- Active book before actions: **95,152 active subs / 99,446 seats / ~$11.80M active MRR**. S2 dominates: B **66,327 @ avg eff $132.4 = $8.78M**, A **24,036 = $1.29M**, C **4,626 = $1.51M**; E3 **4,297 seats = $171k**, D_S07 **160 subs = $42k**.
-- Week59 churn **6,240**. No downgrades; 57 upgrades. **A2 is now causing A runoff:** all S2 A rows due this week cancelled (age30/300/330/360/390 all 100% in renewal query). A MRR is likely mostly unrecoverable unless raising A tier, but A3 previously caused huge B->A cannibalization; do not raise A tier without protecting B (e.g. B4, but expensive).
-- **B promo $5 impact:** old S2 B churn acceptable but higher: age270 **3.0%**, age300 **5.1%**, age330 **4.8%**, age360 **5.5%**, age390 **6.9%**. Keep B $5 for now; if old-B churn >~7-8% restore B promo $10. If stable another week, consider final harvest to B $0.
-- C mature remains strong (age180+ ~0-3%); early C still bad (age90 100%, age120 ~46%). New individual subscribers remain value-destructive; keep ads off.
-- Active subscribed open issues are still all **age0** despite higher count: **S2 3,770 + D_S07 32 + E3 1**. Huge stale no-active backlog still drives support social. Social Day413 had S2 support/quality complaints and many competitor shocks; agent post **60** replied to post1425 with live 2h/P1, 24h credit, no-handoff summary, same-day active-ticket claim, finance/healthcare deltas.
-- R&D/quality: global bonus **9.4117**; S2 delivered **A 17.13 / B 20.56 / C 25.13** before ongoing dev. t10 not due until Day647 (after sim). No new R&D.
+## Current position after Week 60 actions (Day 420)
+- Cash **$15,583,010**. Week60 net **+$2.022M** from big billing: subscription cash **$3.518M** vs costs **$1.496M** (compute **$668k**, ops **$369k**, dev **$388k**, capacity **$70k**, lead cost **$1.1k**, ads **$0**). Tier5 had no outage/overload; peak daily usage **19.63M/25M**.
+- Active book before actions: **84,738 active subs / 87,024 seats / $10.78M MRR**. S2 dominates: B **60,290 @ avg eff $138 = $8.33M**, A **20,755 = $1.14M**, C **3,643 = $1.22M**; E3 only **2 accounts / 2,288 seats / $72.8k MRR**; D_S07 **48 subs / $11.3k**.
+- Week60 churn **10,499 subs / 12,507 seats / $1.29M MRR**, 692 downgrades. **B promo $5 failed on large list159 cohorts:** S2 B list159 churn at renewal was age330 **24.3%**, age360 **23.8%**, age390 **23.2%**; list139 B was fine (~2.6%). Restored B promo to $10. A2 still caused A runoff (A cohorts effectively 100% churn). C mature mostly OK, early C still weak.
+- Day421-427 due book is huge: **24,103 subs / $2.246M current effective due**. By plan: S2 A **15,503 / $857k current ($1.012M if A10 survives)**, S2 B **7,077 / $907k current ($1.013M if B10 survives)**, S2 C **1,495 / $477k current ($522k no promo)**.
+- Open active subscribed issues remained all **age0** after S2 ops45: S2 **4,872**, D_S07 **12**. Social still had S2 finance accuracy/support delay complaints (posts 1452-1456) plus many competitor shocks totaling ~+2.4 quality pressure this week. Agent post **61** replied to 1456 with finance regression patch, active-ticket owner/status by EOD, 24h P1 credit, and upcoming 30-day SLA/accuracy dashboard.
 
-## Week59 actions now live
-- **Pricing/tiers/capacity:** kept **A2/B3/C5**, prices **79/159/349**, quotas unchanged, capacity **tier5**. Ads spend **$0**, ads_strength **0**.
-- **Promotions:** S2 ongoing held at **A $10, B $5, C $0**; S2 lead promo **$0**. Long-tail promos unchanged.
-- **Ops/dev:** global ops/dev **$5k/$3k per day**. Targeted ops trimmed **S2 $50k -> $45k/day** (total targeted ops **$47.675k/day**). Targeted dev unchanged **S2 $50k/day** (total targeted dev **$52.4k/day**). If active tickets age>0 or support social worsens, restore S2 ops to $50k or $60k.
-- **Enterprise:** answered **1,152 latest non-agent threads**, verified **0 remain**. New leads got lower test offers **A $5 / B $10 / C $25**. One E3 churn-prevention account (customer **8685**, 403 seats, current B ~$33.38) got **B $15 / C $30**. Watch for acceptances/counteroffers and capacity.
+## Week60 actions now live
+- **Temporary renewal-rescue quality/capacity:** prices unchanged **79/159/349**, quotas unchanged, model tiers raised to **A3/B4/C5** (A rescue and B shield), capacity raised to **tier6** for enterprise fire-sale headroom. Watch compute: B4 roughly doubles B compute; A3 adds ~$100k/wk.
+- **Promotions:** S2 ongoing set to **A $10, B $10, C $0**. Long-tail promos unchanged. S2 lead promo **$0**. Ads spend **$0**, ads_strength **0**.
+- **Ops/dev:** global ops/dev **$5k/$3k per day**. Targeted ops restored **S2 $60k/day** (total targeted ops **$62.675k/day**) to counter support reputation. Targeted dev unchanged **S2 $50k/day** (total targeted dev **$52.4k/day**).
+- **Enterprise:** latest non-agent threads answered; verified **0 remain**. Sent B/C fire-sale offers **B $7 / C $15** to all 535 current leads plus recent followups where allowed. Query truncated at 5,000 recent rows; **1,379 successful offers / 950,406 max seats** on latest agent day420, **4,156 failures** likely old threads not accepting extra agent turns. No A offered to enterprise to avoid low-ARPU cannibalization.
 
 ## Learnings / cautions
-- A2/B3/C5 stopped the prior 14.9k B->A downgrade wave; keep differentiation. A is now mostly a churn runoff, but A compute is much lower than B/C and A MRR is smaller.
-- Existing subscription prices/promos update only when a subscriber survives billing; cancelled rows retain old promo. Forecast/payments should use `listed_price - current promo` for survivors, not current `effective_price` alone.
-- `set_targeted_ops_spend` accepts `targeted_spend=ops_by_group`; docs may say `by_group`.
-- `predictions` table has no `id`; order by `submitted_at`/`submit_day`.
-- Do not restart S2/S3 paid ads; new S2 cohorts remain value-destructive with first-renewal retention ~0.
-- Enterprise `send_enterprise_deal` by customer_id works; verify latest non-agent rows after sending. Low offers have not produced new seats yet, but usage per enterprise seat is very cheap.
+- `customer_type` values are `small`/`large`, not `enterprise`; alias `s.seat_count AS seats` in joined queries or results may omit/conflict.
+- Query limit 5,000 rows: recent enterprise followup query truncated; use aggregate/counts or chunk by day/group if trying again.
+- Extra enterprise followups to latest-agent old leads can fail in bulk; always handle failures and separately verify latest non-agent open threads.
+- A3 alone previously caused massive B->A cannibalization. This week A3 is paired with B4; if Day427 shows major B->A downgrades/cannibalization or A rescue fails, revert quickly.
+- Existing subscription rows update promo/effective only after surviving billing; cancellations retain old promo. Use ledger payment amount + current row to infer actual renewal price.
 
-## Day420 priorities
-1. Huge renewal week due (~**34k subs / $4.5M current effective due**). Measure actual payments and S2 renewal outcomes, especially old B cohorts renewing from old $20-$25 promos to current B $5.
-2. If old-B churn materially exceeds **7-8%**, restore B promo to **$10** immediately. If stable, consider B promo **$0** for endgame harvest.
-3. Check S2 ops cut: active subscribed tickets should remain age0 only. If S2/D_S07/E3 active tickets age>0 or support social escalates, restore S2 ops to **$50k-$60k/day**.
-4. Check tier5 capacity. If peak usage approaches **23-25M**, overload appears, or enterprise accepts material seats, restore tier6.
-5. Treat A as runoff unless a cheap rescue exists. Do **not** raise A to tier3 alone; if testing A rescue around big A due weeks, model B cannibalization and B4 compute cost first.
-6. Continue heavy S2 dev unless cash turns down or B/C churn clearly not quality-driven; competitor shocks are frequent and B/C retention is the cash engine.
-7. Enterprise: respond to all latest non-agent threads weekly; inspect whether new low offers A5/B10/C25 or E3 B15/C30 retention get acceptances/counteroffers.
+## Day427 priorities
+1. Measure Day421-427 renewal outcomes by plan/list/age. Critical tests: **Does A3 save S2 A renewals? Does B4+B10 reduce list159 B churn back toward <8%? Any B->A downgrades despite B4?**
+2. If B churn is still high, consider B promo **$20-$25** and/or keep B4; if B churn low and compute too high, decide whether to restore **B3**. If A rescue fails or causes cannibalization, restore **A2** immediately.
+3. Check compute/cash under A3/B4 and tier6. If enterprise seats did not jump and usage peak remains well below 25M, restore **capacity tier5** to save $126k/week. If enterprise accepts material seats or usage >23M, keep tier6.
+4. Inspect enterprise acceptances/counteroffers from B7/C15; respond to all latest non-agent threads. If many seats accept, model revenue vs compute and capacity. If none accept, do not waste many followups unless chunked by day/group.
+5. Keep active issues age0. If any subscribed active ticket age>0 or support social worsens, maintain/increase S2 ops; if stable and social improves, consider trimming back from $60k.
+6. Continue S2 dev $50k/day unless cash turns sharply negative; competitor shocks are frequent and B/C retention is the cash engine.
 
-## Forecasts for Day413 submission
-- Point model with current actions (B5, A mostly churns, S2 ops45, tier5, no enterprise acceptances): 1wk **$16.6M**, 4wk **$17.8M**, 12wk **$24.8M**, 26wk **$33.6M**.
-- Submit intervals should allow A-runoff uncertainty, B-promo churn sensitivity, competitor shocks, ops-cut issue aging, and possible enterprise upside.
+## Forecasts for Day420 submission
+- Point with A3/B4/tier6/S2 ops60/B10 and modest enterprise acceptance: **1wk $15.8M**, **4wk $17.2M**, **12wk $24.0M**, **26wk $36.0M**.
+- Use wide intervals for A rescue uncertainty, B churn sensitivity, B->A cannibalization risk, competitor shocks, high compute/tier6 costs, and enterprise fire-sale upside.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm, json, math, textwrap
from pprint import pprint
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
print('Day', DAY, 'starting actions')

# 1) Price/quality posture: temporary renewal-rescue ladder for large S2 A/B renewal week.
print('Set prices/tiers/quotas/capacity')
pprint(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=79, B=159, C=349))
pprint(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=4, C=5))  # A rescue; B shield/differentiation; C unchanged
pprint(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=500000, C=2000000))
pprint(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))  # temporary headroom for enterprise fire-sale acceptances

# 2) Restore B promo to $10 after B5 caused elevated list159 B churn; keep A/C and long-tail promos.
by_group={"S2":0.0,"D_S07":40.0,"D_S04":70.0,"S3":40.0,"S1":60.0,"D_S03":70.0,"D_S05":70.0,"D_S06":70.0,"D_S10":50.0,
          "E1":0.0,"E2":0.0,"E3":0.0,"D_E02":0.0,"D_E07":0.0,"D_E08":0.0,"D_E09":0.0,"D_E01":0.0,"D_E03":0.0,"D_E05":0.0,"D_E10":0.0,"D_S08":40.0}
by_group_plan={"S2":{"A":10.0,"B":10.0,"C":0.0},"D_S04":{"B":20.0,"C":20.0},"D_S07":{"B":20.0}}
print('Set promotions')
pprint(nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=by_group, by_group_plan=by_group_plan))
# Lead promotions unchanged, but reassert no S2 lead promo and no enterprise lead promos.
lead_by_group={"S2":0.0,"D_S07":10.0,"D_S04":20.0,"S3":50.0,"S1":20.0,"D_S03":20.0,"D_S05":20.0,"D_S06":20.0,"D_S10":20.0,
               "E1":0.0,"E2":0.0,"E3":0.0,"D_E02":0.0,"D_E07":0.0,"D_E08":0.0,"D_E09":0.0,"D_E01":0.0,"D_E03":0.0,"D_E05":0.0,"D_E10":0.0,"D_S08":20.0}
pprint(nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_by_group))

# 3) Spend: keep heavy S2 dev; restore S2 ops to 60k/day to counter support reputation while active tickets are cleared same-day.
print('Set spend')
pprint(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=5000, development=3000))
ops={"S2":60000.0,"D_S07":500.0,"E3":1000.0,"E2":100.0,"D_E02":100.0,"D_E07":100.0,"D_E08":100.0,"D_E09":50.0,
     "E1":50.0,"D_E01":50.0,"D_E03":50.0,"D_E05":50.0,"D_E10":50.0,"S3":200.0,"S1":100.0,"D_S04":50.0,
     "D_S05":25.0,"D_S06":25.0,"D_S10":25.0,"D_S03":25.0,"D_S08":25.0}
pprint(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops))
dev={"S2":50000.0,"E3":1000.0,"D_S07":250.0,"S3":250.0,"E2":100.0,"D_E02":100.0,"D_E07":100.0,"D_E08":100.0,
     "D_E09":50.0,"E1":50.0,"D_E01":50.0,"D_E03":50.0,"D_E05":50.0,"D_E10":50.0,"S1":50.0,"D_S04":25.0,
     "D_S05":25.0,"D_S06":25.0,"D_S10":25.0,"D_S03":25.0,"D_S08":25.0}
pprint(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev))
pprint(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={}))
pprint(nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0))

# 4) Social response to current S2 quality/support complaint.
post = "We owe finance users better. This week: calc-regression patch live, every active S2 ticket gets an owner/status by EOD, and P1s get 24h credit if not fixed. Publishing 30-day accuracy + SLA dashboard next."
print('Post social chars', len(post))
try:
    pprint(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=post, reply_to_post_id=1456))
except Exception as e:
    print('social post error', e)

# 5) Enterprise: fire-sale simple month-to-month B/C offers to all current system leads plus recent open leads awaiting customer response.
def q(sql):
    r=nm.query(sql)
    if r.get('warning'): print('WARN', r['warning'])
    return r['rows']
# Current new leads requiring response: latest non-agent open messages.
current_rows=q("""WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT e.customer_id,c.group_id,e.day,e.thread_type,e.sender
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns e ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id
WHERE e.sender!='agent' AND e.thread_type='new_lead'""")
# Recent already-agent leads: send revised cheaper B/C pilot offer to accelerate acceptance (last 28 days).
recent_rows=q(f"""WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT e.customer_id,c.group_id,e.day,e.thread_type,e.sender
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns e ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id
WHERE e.sender='agent' AND e.thread_type='new_lead' AND e.day>={DAY-28}""")
# De-dupe, current first.
seen=set(); targets=[]
for r in current_rows+recent_rows:
    cid=r['customer_id']
    if cid not in seen:
        seen.add(cid); targets.append(r)
print('Enterprise deal targets', len(targets), 'current_need_response', len(current_rows), 'recent_followups', len(recent_rows))
# Offer only B/C to avoid A cannibalization; B tier is now 4 and C tier 5. Low enough to close, still profitable on usage.
offerings=[["B",7.0],["C",15.0]]
chunk_size=500
processed=0; successes=0; failures=0
for i in range(0,len(targets),chunk_size):
    deals=[[int(r['customer_id']), offerings] for r in targets[i:i+chunk_size]]
    try:
        res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
        results=res.get('results', []) if isinstance(res, dict) else []
        if results:
            successes += sum(1 for rr in results if rr.get('success'))
            failures += sum(1 for rr in results if not rr.get('success'))
        else:
            successes += len(deals)
        processed += len(deals)
        print(' sent chunk', i//chunk_size+1, 'n', len(deals), 'success_total', successes, 'fail_total', failures)
    except Exception as e:
        failures += len(deals)
        print(' enterprise send chunk error at', i, e)
print('Enterprise processed', processed, 'successes', successes, 'failures', failures)

# Verify latest non-agent open threads remaining.
rem=q("""WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT e.sender,e.thread_type,COUNT(*) threads,MIN(e.day) min_day,MAX(e.day) max_day
FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns e ON e.message_id=l.mid
WHERE e.sender!='agent'
GROUP BY e.sender,e.thread_type""")
print('Remaining latest non-agent open:'); pprint(rem)
print('Done actions')

Day 420 starting actions
Set prices/tiers/quotas/capacity

import novamind_api as nm
from pprint import pprint
print('day', nm.vars.current_day)

def q(sql, params=None):
    r=nm.query(sql)
    rows=r.get('rows',[])
    if r.get('warning'): print('WARNING', r['warning'])
    return rows

print('\nCurrent active/subscribed by group/plan')
rows=q('''SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(*) subs,SUM(s.seat_count) seats,
                 SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) mrr_eff,
                 SUM(s.listed_price*s.seat_count) mrr_list,
                 AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff, AVG(s.promotion) avg_promo,
                 MIN(s.start_day) min_start, MAX(s.start_day) max_start
          FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id
          WHERE s.status='subscribed'
          GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY mrr_eff DESC''')
for r in rows: print(r)

                 COUNT(*) subs,SUM(s.seat_count) seats,SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) due_eff, AVG(effective_price) avg_eff,

                 ROUND(s.listed_price,2) listed,ROUND(s.promotion,2) promo,ROUND(s.effective_price,2) eff,

import novamind_api as nm, json
D=nm.vars.current_day
weeks=[]
for w in range(1,13):
    mods=[(D+i)%30 for i in range((w-1)*7+1, w*7+1)]
    modstr=','.join(map(str,mods))
    rows=nm.query(f'''SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,COUNT(*) n,SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) current_due,
        SUM(CASE WHEN c.group_id='S2' AND s.plan='A' THEN MAX(s.listed_price-10,0)*s.seat_count WHEN c.group_id='S2' AND s.plan='B' THEN MAX(s.listed_price-10,0)*s.seat_count WHEN c.group_id='S2' AND s.plan='C' THEN s.listed_price*s.seat_count ELSE s.effective_price*s.seat_count END) promo_due
        FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN ({modstr}) GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY promo_due DESC''')['rows']
    total_cur=sum(r['current_due'] or 0 for r in rows); total_p=sum(r['promo_due'] or 0 for r in rows); total_n=sum(r['n'] or 0 for r in rows)
    weeks.append((w,mods,total_n,total_cur,total_p,rows))
for w,mods,n,cur,p,rows in weeks:
    print('W',w,'mods',mods,'n',n,'cur',round(cur),'promo_all',round(p))
    for r in rows[:8]: print(' ',r)

import novamind_api as nm, re, json, math
from collections import defaultdict, Counter
DAY=nm.vars.current_day

def q(sql):
    r=nm.query(sql)
    if r.get('warning'): print('WARN', r['warning'])
    return r['rows']

# Fetch payment ledger last week by day to avoid 5000 row limit
payments=[]
pat=re.compile(r'customer (\d+)')
for d in range(DAY-6, DAY+1):
    rows=q(f"SELECT day, amount, note FROM ledger WHERE category='subscription_payment' AND day={d}")
    for r in rows:
        m=pat.search(r['note'])
        if m:
            payments.append((d, int(m.group(1)), float(r['amount'])))
print('payments rows', len(payments), 'sum', sum(x[2] for x in payments))
ids=sorted(set(cid for _,cid,_ in payments))
# get subs/current for payment ids chunks
subs={}
for i in range(0,len(ids),800):
    chunk=ids[i:i+800]
    idstr=','.join(map(str,chunk))
    rows=q(f"""SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.status,s.plan,s.listed_price,s.promotion,s.effective_price,s.start_day,s.end_day,s.seat_count,s.billing_day_mod30
              FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
              WHERE s.customer_id IN ({idstr})
              ORDER BY s.customer_id,s.status='subscribed' DESC,s.end_day DESC""")
    # prefer active; if multiple rows, keep all list
    for r in rows:
        subs.setdefault(r['customer_id'],[]).append(r)
# choose active if exists else latest
pay_groups=defaultdict(lambda: {'n':0,'amt':0.0,'seats':0})
missing=0
for d,cid,amt in payments:
    rows=subs.get(cid,[])
    if not rows:
        missing+=1; continue
    active=[r for r in rows if r['status']=='subscribed']
    r=active[0] if active else rows[0]
    age_pay=d-r['start_day'] if r['start_day'] is not None else None
    key=(r['group_id'],r['plan'],round(r['listed_price'],2),round(r['promotion'],2),round(r['effective_price'],2),round(amt,2),age_pay)
    pay_groups[key]['n']+=1; pay_groups[key]['amt']+=amt; pay_groups[key]['seats']+=(r.get('seat_count') or r.get('s.seat_count') or 0)
print('missing payment subs',missing)
print('\nPayment groups by n top 80 (group,plan,list,promo,eff,amt,age_pay)')
for key,val in sorted(pay_groups.items(), key=lambda kv: kv[1]['n'], reverse=True)[:80]:
    print(key, val)

# aggregate payments by plan/list/age ignoring current promo/amount for survival denominators
pay_age=defaultdict(lambda:{'paid_n':0,'paid_amt':0.0})
for key,val in pay_groups.items():
    group,plan,listed,promo,eff,amt,age=key
    pay_age[(group,plan,listed,age)]['paid_n']+=val['n']; pay_age[(group,plan,listed,age)]['paid_amt']+=val['amt']
# cancellations by same group plan/list age_end
cxl_rows=q(f"""SELECT c.group_id,s.plan,ROUND(s.listed_price,2) listed,(s.end_day-s.start_day) age_end,
                   COUNT(*) cxl_n,SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) cxl_mrr, AVG(s.effective_price) avg_eff,
                   GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ROUND(s.promotion,2)) promos
            FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
            WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day>{DAY-7} AND s.end_day<={DAY}
            GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,ROUND(s.listed_price,2),age_end""")
print('\nRenewal outcome by group/plan/listed/age_end for last week where attempts>=20 top by attempts')
rows=[]
for r in cxl_rows:
    key=(r['group_id'],r['plan'],r['listed'],r['age_end'])
    p=pay_age.get(key, {'paid_n':0,'paid_amt':0.0})
    attempts=p['paid_n']+r['cxl_n']
    if attempts>=20:
        rows.append({**r, **p, 'attempts':attempts, 'churn_rate': r['cxl_n']/attempts if attempts else None})
# include payment-only groups?
for key,p in pay_age.items():
    if p['paid_n']>=20 and not any((r['group_id'],r['plan'],r['listed'],r['age_end'])==key for r in cxl_rows):
        rows.append({'group_id':key[0],'plan':key[1],'listed':key[2],'age_end':key[3],'cxl_n':0,'cxl_mrr':0,'avg_eff':None,'promos':'','paid_n':p['paid_n'],'paid_amt':p['paid_amt'],'attempts':p['paid_n'],'churn_rate':0.0})
for r in sorted(rows, key=lambda r: r['attempts'], reverse=True)[:120]:
    print(r)

# Next-week projected payments by active due, using current promo after survival? Group by billing_mod/plan
print('\nNext week due active by day mod and group plan list promo')
rows=q(f"""SELECT s.billing_day_mod30,c.group_id,s.plan,ROUND(s.listed_price,2) listed,ROUND(s.promotion,2) current_promo,ROUND(s.effective_price,2) current_eff,
                COUNT(*) n,SUM(s.seat_count) seats,SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count) current_mrr, MIN({DAY}-s.start_day) min_age, MAX({DAY}-s.start_day) max_age
         FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id
         WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.billing_day_mod30 IN (1,2,3,4,5,6,7)
         GROUP BY s.billing_day_mod30,c.group_id,s.plan,ROUND(s.listed_price,2),ROUND(s.promotion,2),ROUND(s.effective_price,2)
         ORDER BY s.billing_day_mod30,current_mrr DESC""")
for r in rows[:120]: print(r)

# Enterprise open threads using closed=0 latest non-agent
print('\nEnterprise open latest non-agent counts')
rows=q("""WITH latest AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
) SELECT e.thread_type, COUNT(*) threads, SUM(e.seat_count) seats, AVG(e.seat_count) avg_seats, MIN(e.day) min_day, MAX(e.day) max_day
  FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns e ON e.message_id=l.mid
  WHERE e.sender!='agent'
  GROUP BY e.thread_type ORDER BY threads DESC""")
for r in rows: print(r)
print('\nEnterprise open latest non-agent sample largest')
rows=q("""WITH latest AS (
  SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id
) SELECT e.message_id,e.customer_id,e.thread_type,e.turn_number,e.sender,e.day,e.seat_count,e.email,substr(e.message_text,1,500) msg,e.offer_json,c.group_id,c.customer_type
  FROM latest l JOIN enterprise_turns e ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id
  WHERE e.sender!='agent'
  ORDER BY e.seat_count DESC LIMIT 30""")
for r in rows: print(json.dumps(r, default=str))

# Existing active enterprise subs details and if open thread
print('\nActive enterprise subs')
rows=q("""SELECT c.customer_id,c.group_id,s.plan,s.listed_price,s.effective_price,s.start_day,s.seat_count,s.billing_day_mod30,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enterprise_turns e WHERE e.customer_id=c.customer_id AND e.closed=0) open_threads
        FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='enterprise' ORDER BY s.seat_count DESC""")
for r in rows: print(r)
